summary: Implemented Issue #148 as a deterministic Phase 4 diagnostic baseline for Phase 3 common clip datasets. The workflow preserves the Phase 3 grouped splits, validates the accepted dataset v1 freeze, extracts compact spatial and temporal features, fits a standardized nearest-centroid classifier, and writes model, metrics, predictions, confusion matrix, manifest, and run log artifacts. A lightweight run against the existing 18-clip pilot completed successfully.
non_blocking_issues: The pilot contains only three independent groups per n_flagella class, so its metric values are diagnostic and are not sufficient for model adoption or independent-run-count decisions.
Grouped learning curve execution and n_flagella-specific run-count decisions remain under Issue #129.
RUN-TUMBLE dataset v2 remains deferred in Issue #145 with Project Status TODO.

tests_reviewed.result: PASS (18 clips, 9 groups; expected six artifacts plus run.log)

adr_reason: This is a bounded diagnostic baseline that follows the accepted Phase 3 schema, dataset v1 freeze, and grouped split policy. It adds no dependency and does not select a final ML model or change dataset adoption policy.
next_actions: Create and implement a grouped learning curve sub-issue under #133 and connect its outputs to #129.
Implement the #128 dataset freeze checklist as a machine-readable audit gate.
Do not interpret the 18-clip pilot metrics as a final model or dataset-size decision.
